backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Smart Money Vault backend, implementing user profile management, license tracking, trade storage, bot authentication, access control, and Stripe/HTTP outcall integrations.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components, hooks, screens, and configuration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Smart Money Vault frontend, mounting the React app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/index.ts: TypeScript type export file defining the `SignalFetchResult` discriminated union type representing either a successful HTTP response or a `BotError`.
frontend/PHASE1_BACKEND_IMPLEMENTATION_C: Granular step-by-step checklist for implementing Phase 1 backend features (user profiles, bot auth, audit logging, admin dashboard) in Motoko, organized into 11 sections with 189 atomic testable items.
frontend/ROADMAP_BATCH_EXECUTION.md: Detailed batch execution plan for implementing roadmap Phases 3–8 of Smart Money Vault, covering the Connect Wizard, Settings Page, Ed25519 key generation, subscription tiers, trading engine, and institutional hardening features.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that handles authentication state, showing a landing screen for unauthenticated users, a profile setup modal for new users, and the main AppShell wrapped in ToastProvider for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/analytics/Analyt: A slide-out sheet component that displays analytics events in two tabs: local (in-memory) events and backend-fetched events, with color-coded badges and icons per event type.
A small ghost button with a bar chart icon that serves as the entry point to open the analytics drawer.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: A login/logout button that uses Internet Identity authentication, showing loading, signed-in, or signed-out states and clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: A modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter a display name and optional account identifier to create their profile.
frontend/src/components/common/AccessDen: A centered screen shown when a user lacks access, displaying an error icon and a sign-in button if the user is unauthenticated.
frontend/src/components/common/LoadingSk: Exports reusable skeleton placeholder components (Card, Table, Form, Chart, Page) for use during data loading states.
frontend/src/components/common/StateMess: A reusable centered message component for empty or error states, supporting a title, description, icon, and optional action button.
frontend/src/components/common/ToastProv: A context-based toast notification system that renders success, error, and info toasts at the top-center of the screen with auto-dismiss after 5 seconds.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/AuditL: A dashboard panel that fetches and displays the last 50 audit log entries in a scrollable table, with loading skeleton, error, and empty state handling.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Dashbo: Renders the top navigation header for the Smart Money Vault app, including nav buttons for different screens, admin/settings links, analytics entrypoint, and an onboarding tour launcher.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Equity: Displays a composed line/area chart of the user's equity curve over time, fetched via the useGetEquityCurve hook, with loading, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/LiveLo: Shows a terminal-style live log panel that periodically pings bot uplink status and allows the user to run a connectivity test, displaying timestamped log entries.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/LivePu: Functionally identical to LiveLogsPanel, rendering a live pulse terminal with periodic uplink status pings and a connectivity test button; appears to be a duplicate component.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Perfor: Renders an area chart of the equity curve for performance telemetry, using skeleton and state message components for loading, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/System: Displays system health metrics including bot online/offline status, license validity, ICP cycles, and last heartbeat timestamp, fetched via useGetHeartbeatData.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Uplink: Dashboard card component that displays and toggles the bot's uplink status (EXECUTE/STANDBY) using a switch control, with loading and error states.
Root layout component that manages client-side routing between screens (dashboard, trades, admin, overview, settings, payment) via URL hash/path, renders the header, and tracks navigation analytics.
frontend/src/components/settings/AdminTi: Settings panel that fetches and displays subscription tier configurations in a table, showing tier name, status, price, bot/API limits, and features.
frontend/src/components/settings/Connect: Settings panel showing the bot's current public key and URL connection status, with a button to open the ConnectBotWizardModal for configuration.
Multi-step wizard modal that generates an Ed25519 keypair via the Web Crypto API, displays the private key for copying, then links the public key and bot HTTPS URL to the backend.
frontend/src/components/settings/Profile: Settings form for editing the user's display name, account ID, timezone, and notification preferences, pre-populated from the caller's profile and saved via mutation.
frontend/src/components/settings/StripeC: A modal form component for configuring Stripe integration, accepting a secret key and allowed countries with validation, then submitting via the useSetStripeConfiguration hook.
frontend/src/components/settings/Subscri: Displays subscription tier cards (with fallbacks) and handles tier selection, Stripe checkout session creation, and admin Stripe configuration modal toggling.
frontend/src/components/tour/OnboardingT: Provides a React context for an onboarding tour, managing step registration, navigation, persistence in localStorage, and rendering a tooltip overlay on targeted DOM elements.
frontend/src/components/tour/types.ts: Defines TypeScript types TourStep and TourState used by the onboarding tour system.
frontend/src/components/tour/useOnboardi: Re-exports the useOnboardingTour hook from OnboardingTourProvider as a standalone module.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdmin.ts: Provides React Query hooks for admin operations including checking admin status, listing licenses, and creating, updating, or revoking licenses via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useAnalytics.ts: Manages local analytics events stored in localStorage, providing recordEvent and clearEvents utilities with a cap of 100 events.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuditLedger.ts: Fetches the backend audit log with a configurable limit, refreshing every 10 seconds via React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackendAnalytics.t: Provides React Query hooks to fetch and store analytics events on the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUserProfile: Provides hooks to fetch and save the authenticated caller's user profile via the backend actor using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useEquityCurve.ts: Derives an equity curve time series from paginated trade data by accumulating PnL from closed trades starting from a baseline of 10,000.
frontend/src/hooks/useFetchSignalsTest.t: Exposes a mutation hook that calls the backend fetchSignals method as a connectivity test, displaying success or error toasts with status and response details.
frontend/src/hooks/useHeartbeat.ts: React Query hook that fetches heartbeat data for a given account ID from the actor, refreshing every 10 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, managing login/logout state and persisting identity via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useLicense.ts: React Query hook that fetches the current user's license status from the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useLinkBotPublicKey.t: Mutation hook that registers a bot public key via the actor and invalidates related queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useLiveLogs.ts: React Query hook that fetches the latest 50 paginated trades for the current user, refreshing every 5 seconds as a live feed.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetBotUrl.ts: Mutation hook that validates and sets the bot URL via the actor, showing toast notifications on success or error.
frontend/src/hooks/useStripe.ts: Collection of React Query hooks and mutations for Stripe integration, covering configuration checks, checkout session creation, and session status retrieval.
frontend/src/hooks/useTiers.ts: React Query hooks for listing all subscription tiers and fetching a single tier by ID from the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrades.ts: React Query hook that fetches a paginated list of trades filtered by account ID and optional time range.
frontend/src/hooks/useUplink.ts: Hooks for fetching the bot profile and toggling the uplink state on/off via actor mutations with toast feedback.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file defining Tailwind directives and a dark charcoal terminal theme with emerald accent CSS custom properties.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility function `cn` that merges Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/screens/AdminScreen.tsx: Admin panel screen for managing user licenses, allowing admins to create, toggle, or revoke licenses via a form and table UI.
frontend/src/screens/DashboardScreen.tsx: Main dashboard screen composing uplink control, heartbeat, live trade terminal, performance telemetry, and audit ledger cards with onboarding tour steps.
frontend/src/screens/OverviewScreen.tsx: Displays the user's license status and account information in a card layout, with an onboarding tour step registered for the license card.
frontend/src/screens/PaymentFailureScree: Shows a payment failure screen with options to retry or return to the dashboard, and records the failure event via analytics.
frontend/src/screens/PaymentSuccessScree: Shows a payment success confirmation screen and records the successful payment event via analytics before offering navigation back to the dashboard.
frontend/src/screens/SettingsScreen.tsx: Renders a tabbed settings page with Profile, Connect Bot, Subscription, and (for admins) Admin Tiers panels.
frontend/src/screens/TradesScreen.tsx: Displays a paginated, filterable trade history table with account ID and time range filters, and registers onboarding tour steps for the filters and table cards.
frontend/src/utils/actorErrorMessage.ts: Normalizes canister/actor errors into human-readable strings by matching known error patterns like network issues, unauthorized access, and invalid signatures.
frontend/src/utils/encoding.ts: Provides utility functions to convert between hex strings and Uint8Array byte arrays.
frontend/src/utils/format.ts: Provides formatting utilities for converting nanosecond timestamps to locale strings and calculating P&L from trade data.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens (including profit/loss and emerald palette), border radius, shadows, backdrop blur, and animation keyframes. Enables dark mode via class, and includes typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state descriptor for a Motoko/ICP trading license management platform, documenting architectural notes about role-based access control, known issues, and a pending fix request (AR-1) to update access-control.mo so the hardcoded owner principal always bypasses role checks in getUserRole, hasPermission, and isAdmin.
